summary_en: Kengumi Synergy LP (堅果シナジー投資事業有限責任組合) completed tender offer for TIEMCO shares. Acquired 1,113,500 shares (44.96% voting rights) from April 7 to May 22, 2026. Minimum threshold of 1,069,351 shares met; all tendered shares accepted. Settlement effective May 28, 2026. LP becomes major shareholder and new related party.
title_en: Notice Regarding Completion of Public Tender Offer for TIEMCO Shares by Kengumi Synergy Investment LP and Changes in Other Related Companies, Major Shareholders, and Principal Shareholders
translation_en_brief:
On May 25, 2026, TIEMCO announced completion of a public tender offer conducted by Kengumi Synergy Investment LP (堅果シナジー投資事業有限責任組合), a Japanese investment partnership. The tender ran from April 7 to May 22, 2026, and acquired 1,113,500 TIEMCO shares. The minimum acceptance threshold of 1,069,351 shares was exceeded; all tendered shares were accepted. Settlement commences May 28, 2026.

Following settlement, Kengumi Synergy will hold 1,113,500 shares representing 44.96% of voting rights, making it TIEMCO's principal shareholder and a new related party. The partnership was formed February 16, 2026, with total capitalization of ¥3,068,848,166. Its general partner is Kengumi Techno Corp., a domestic investment firm headed by Wang Zhiwei and Osawa Umeyoshi. No pre-existing relationship exists between TIEMCO and the acquiring partnership.

The acquisition follows the partnership model under Japanese Limited Liability Partnership Law, with the stated investment objective to maximize partner returns through enhancement of portfolio company value.
